title: MBBM Stock Solutions Preparation
author: Dr. Steven Wilhelm
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.hgtb3wn

steps.title: Add 25
steps.instruction: Add 25.0 g NaNO 3 per liter d-H 2 O

steps.title: Add 2
steps.instruction: Add 2.5 g CaCl 2 *2H 2 O per liter d-H 2 O

steps.title: Add 7
steps.instruction: Add 7.5 g MgSO 4 *7H 2 O per liter d-H 2 O

steps.title: Add 7
steps.instruction: Add 7.5 g K 2 HPO 4 per liter d-H 2 O

steps.title: Add 17
steps.instruction: Add 17.5 g KH 2 PO 4 per liter d-H 2 O

steps.title: Add 2
steps.instruction: Add 2.5 g NaCl per liter d-H 2 O

steps.title: Add 50
steps.instruction: Add 50.0 g disodium EDTA and 31.0 g KOH per liter d-H 2 O

steps.title: Add 4
steps.instruction: Add 4.98 g FeSO 4 *7H 2 O per liter acidificed H 2 O (Acidified H 2 O is 999.0 mL d-H 2 O + 1.0 mL concentrated H 2 SO 4 )

steps.title: Add 11
steps.instruction: Add 11.42 g H 3 BO 3 per liter d-H 2 O

steps.title: Add per liter d-H 2 O 8
steps.instruction: Add per liter d-H 2 O 8.82 g ZnSO 4 *7H 2 O 1.44 g MnCl 2 *4H 2 O, 0.71 g MoO 3 1.57 g CuSO 4 *5H 2 O 0.49 g CoNO 3 *6H 2 O

steps.title: Autoclave all stock solutions at 121ºC...
steps.instruction: Autoclave all stock solutions at 121ºC for 20 min except solution #8 and #10 (stir to dissolve)
